{"society_power": 7.5, "state_power": 8.0, "society_change": 1.0, "state_change": 0.5, "key_event": "Frei's \"Revolution in Liberty\": agrarian reform, peasant unions, copper Chileanization", "reasoning": "Society strengthened markedly via CP re-legalization, ballot reform, urbanization, and especially the 1967 agrarian/peasant-union laws mobilizing the previously subordinated countryside; the state simultaneously expanded reach through Chileanization of copper and administrative penetration of rural areas, though inflation and the Valdivia earthquake partly offset gains."}
